← Back to MIRAC Technologies

Small Business Automation Software — Booking, WhatsApp & Payments | MIRAC Technologies

Automate bookings and customer communication for your local business.

Local businesses such as hair salons, wellness clinics, gyms, and independent restaurants face constant challenges in managing daily operations while providing excellent customer service. Handling appointments over the phone, dealing with no-shows, and manually responding to customer inquiries on social media takes valuable time away from core business activities. MIRAC Technologies offers a comprehensive Small Business Automation Software designed specifically to streamline operations for local enterprises across the US, UK, Australia, and Canada. Our platform provides a seamless online booking system that integrates directly with your website and social media profiles, allowing customers to schedule appointments 24/7. To drastically reduce no-shows and improve customer engagement, the software features powerful WhatsApp automation. It automatically sends appointment confirmations, timely reminders, and post-visit follow-up messages. The system also includes robust payment integration to handle deposits or full payments securely at the time of booking. Furthermore, a built-in Customer Relationship Management (CRM) tool helps

businesses track customer preferences, purchase history, and run automated loyalty programs to encourage repeat visits. Starting at an affordable price point of $1,500, our solution empowers small business owners to modernize their operations, enhance the customer experience, and focus on growing their business rather than being bogged down by administrative tasks.
